title: Portfolio enumerations
description: Enumerations for portfolio positions, cash flows, and performance

PositionType.description: Discriminator for the type of portfolio position. Determines which position-specific fields are populated. FUND: An LP commitment or investment in a PE/VC fund — tracks commitment, NAV, distributions, and fund-level IRR. CREDIT: A position in a credit facility or tranche — tracks par value, market value, accrued interest, and yield. REAL_ESTATE: A direct or indirect real estate holding — tracks property value, vehicle exposure, and income yield. Example: 'FUND'

CashFlowType.description: Classification of a cash flow event. Used for unified cash flow reporting across asset types. CAPITAL_CALL: LP capital called by a fund (outflow). DISTRIBUTION: Proceeds returned to an LP from a fund (inflow). INTEREST_PAYMENT: Interest received or paid on a credit position. PRINCIPAL_PAYMENT: Repayment of loan principal. FEE: Management fees, admin fees, or other charges. DIVIDEND: Dividend payment from an equity holding. RENT: Rental income from a real estate position. PURCHASE: Cash outflow for acquiring a position or asset. SALE: Cash inflow from selling or exiting a position. OTHER: Any cash flow not covered above. Example: 'CAPITAL_CALL'

CashFlowDirection.description: Direction of the cash flow from the portfolio's perspective. INFLOW: Cash received — distributions, interest payments, rent, sale proceeds, principal repayments. OUTFLOW: Cash paid — capital calls, purchases, fees. The direction combined with CashFlowType allows unambiguous sign convention: amount is always positive, direction indicates the sign. Example: 'OUTFLOW'
